name: 4pk Entertaining Martini Short Cocktail Glass Set - Threshold™: Dishwasher-Safe, Clear Glass, 10.5oz Capacity, Set of 4
description:
Get your home bar ready for your next dinner or holiday party with this 4-Pack Entertaining Martini Short Cocktail Glass Set from Threshold™. This set includes four short, 3.81-inch-tall cocktail glasses that are great for martinis and other cocktails or mocktails. Designed for serving cold beverages only, the glasses can be tossed in the dishwasher after use for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
